source.description: A reviewed six-panel felt-tip marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent face-free cowboy hat on warm paper, drawn as the hat itself with no head, person, lettering, sticker outline, badge frame, or extra western prop.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one tilted brim sweep and crown axis, wraps a single hat silhouette around them, clarifies the crown dents and brim overlap, adds an established band and buckle, then inks and colors every existing shape before final cleanup only.

final_elements.name: tilted brim sweep, crown axis, and crown envelope
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes one wide rising brim, a centered crown axis, and a tall tapered crown envelope in a lively three-quarter view.

final_elements.name: cowboy-hat silhouette with curled brim and tapered crown
final_elements.description: A chunky contour shapes the front brim, two upturned sides, and tall crown without changing the original tilt.

final_elements.name: center dent, two side pinches, brim overlap, and underside edge
final_elements.description: Curved internal lines clarify the crown's center dent, paired side pinches, and the visible underside of the near brim.

final_elements.name: hatband, square buckle, and short stitch accents
final_elements.description: A simple band wraps the existing crown base with one square buckle and a few short handmade stitch marks.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with golden-orange, raspberry, and teal marker fills
final_elements.description: Bold black marker reinforces every established contour; golden orange fills the crown, raspberry deepens the brim underside, and teal fills the band.

frames.visible_job: Places a light tilted brim sweep, centered crown axis, and tall tapered crown envelope at one fixed scale.
introduces: tilted brim sweep, crown axis, and crown envelope

frames.visible_job: Wraps one bold readable contour around the guides to form the wide brim, curled sides, and tapered crown.
introduces: cowboy-hat silhouette with curled brim and tapered crown
requires_prior_elements: tilted brim sweep, crown axis, and crown envelope

frames.visible_job: Adds the center dent, two side pinches, front brim overlap, and visible underside edge inside the established hat.
introduces: center dent, two side pinches, brim overlap, and underside edge
requires_prior_elements: cowboy-hat silhouette with curled brim and tapered crown

frames.visible_job: Adds a simple hatband, one square buckle, and short stitch accents around the established crown base.
introduces: hatband, square buckle, and short stitch accents
requires_prior_elements: cowboy-hat silhouette with curled brim and tapered crown
center dent, two side pinches, brim overlap, and underside edge

frames.visible_job: Thickens every established contour and fills the existing crown, brim underside, band, and buckle with visible marker texture.
introduces: thick black outline with golden-orange, raspberry, and teal marker fills
requires_prior_elements: cowboy-hat silhouette with curled brim and tapered crown
center dent, two side pinches, brim overlap, and underside edge
hatband, square buckle, and short stitch accents

final_step.step_name: Tip the hat to the finish
final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established brim, crown dents, band, buckle, stitch marks, marker fills, and small highlight gaps.
allowed_changes: small highlight gaps on established shapes

rejection_checks: No brim section, crown contour, dent, pinch, band, buckle, stitch, outline, or color area may first appear in the final panel.
The hat must retain one three-quarter tilt, crown height, brim curl, scale, and crop across every frame.
Do not draw finished crown detail beneath the opaque hatband; only visible structure should survive around it.
Reject faces, heads, people, text, labels, cattle, boots, ropes, sticker outlines, badge frames, or decorative borders.
Reject glossy vector icon art, airbrushed rendering, smooth digital gradients, or mechanically perfect symmetry.
